name: Lady April's Renaissance Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups Mexican Beef Style Heartline
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and rinse the beans.
2. Bring a pot of water to boil and add 1 cup of water. Drain and soak the beans for one hour.
3. Add jalapenos and Heartline Meatless Meat. Cook until beans are tender.
4. Stir in the rest of the ingredients and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Makes about 3 quarts.
